title: Trimming Shop Shower Curtain With 12 Hooks, Mold and Mildew Resistant 72x72 Inch Long, Washable PEVA Plain Bathroom Curtains, Shower Curtain Liner 180 x 180cm Long, White
features: 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋: The shower curtains are made of PEVA material (polyethylene vinyl acetate), are fully waterproof and available in a range of attractive colours to match your bathroom décor
𝐀𝐕𝐀𝐈𝐋𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐒𝐈𝐙𝐄: Shower curtains for bathroom decoration are available in sizes 180cm x 180cm and perfectly meet your requirements
𝐅𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐄𝐒: The shower curtain is mildew proof and waterproof and dries quickly. It only needs to be wiped clean with a soft, clean cloth to ensure it remains stunningly vibrant
𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐄𝐒 𝐖𝐈𝐓𝐇 𝟏𝟐 𝐇𝐎𝐎𝐊𝐒: Our bath curtain comes with 12 sturdy plastic hooks. Our shower curtains are ready to use straight out of the pack
𝐒𝐔𝐈𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐅𝐎𝐑: Suitable for bathtubs and showers in many standard sizes for your home, motels, campers, hotels and more; Can be used with both straight and curved shower rods
description: Product Description What material is the shower curtain made from? The Trimming Shop shower curtain is made from high-quality PEVA (polyethylene vinyl acetate) material What are the dimensions of the curtain? The shower curtain measures 180cm x 180cm, making it ideal for most standard bathtubs and showers Does the curtain come with hooks? Yes, it comes with 12 sturdy plastic hooks, making it ready to hang straight out of the packaging. Is the curtain mold-proof and easy to clean? Yes, the PEVA material is mould-proof, water-resistant, and quick-drying. You can easily clean it by wiping it with a soft, damp cloth. Where can I use this shower curtain? It’s suitable for homes, hotels, motels, campers, and more - anywhere you need a waterproof and stylish shower solution.
